title: Peronalised button on board of a saved view
excerpt:
Rather than creating a whole new board, it would be great to have a button with a saved view - for example. View all Done items.

posts.author: ijemz (Jay Peixe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Rather than creating a whole new board, it would be great to have a button with a saved view - for example. View all Done items.

Saving a view to a whole new board can be problematic if it gets changed by someone and also adds to the clutter IMO.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jay,

You could use the Dashboard feature with filters tailored specifically for tracking and viewing all ‘Done’ items assigned to you across multiple boards.

You could then set up a Table Widget in the Dashboard, and apply filters to track these tasks, allowing you to see only what’s relevant and done.

Cheers,
Harsh
Fario Consulting
